# EventSound AV Services

> EventSound is a professional audio visual hire and event production company based in Drogheda, Co. Louth, Ireland. Owner-operated by Graham (Managing Director) with over 20 years of industry experience. We provide full-service AV equipment hire and technical event production for corporate events, conferences, exhibitions, festivals, concerts, and live events across Dublin, Leinster, and nationwide Ireland. Every hire is quoted on an all-inclusive basis covering equipment, delivery, installation, operation, and breakdown.

## Services

### LED Video Wall Hire
EventSound provides modular LED video wall hire for conferences, concerts, festivals, corporate events, and outdoor screenings across Ireland. We stock Unilumin and Absen LED panels in pixel pitches from 1.9mm to 3.9mm, with screen sizes from 6m² for conference presentations to 50m²+ for large-scale outdoor stages. Indoor LED walls are the standard for corporate conferences, awards nights, AGMs, product launches, and exhibitions where ambient light, ceiling height, or room layout make projectors impractical. Outdoor LED walls are weather-rated with high-brightness output visible in direct sunlight, available on freestanding ground-support structures or integrated with stage rigging. We also design curved, angled, and custom-shaped LED wall configurations. Every LED wall hire includes delivery, installation, content management, a dedicated on-site operator, and full breakdown after the event. Notable events include Swords Castle Summer Concerts, Beta Festival, and multi-day festival productions.
URL: https://eventsound.ie/services/led-video-walls/

### LED Screen & TV Hire
Individual LED screen and TV monitor hire for corporate events, conferences, exhibitions, and trade shows. Screens from 43 inches to 98 inches on freestanding floor stands, table mounts, or wall-mount brackets. Ideal for boardroom presentations, breakout rooms, registration areas, wayfinding signage, sponsor branding, and digital signage. Compatible with Microsoft Teams, Zoom, and Google Meet for hybrid events and video conferencing. Content loading and scheduling included. For larger modular LED panel installations, see LED Video Wall Hire.
URL: https://eventsound.ie/services/led-screen-hire/

### Stage Hire
Professional staging, pipe and drape, star cloth, and scenic elements for events across Ireland. Indoor and outdoor portable stages for conferences, award ceremonies, corporate events, school events, concerts, and festivals. Stage sizes from small presentation platforms to large outdoor performance stages. All staging includes safe installation by experienced crew, skirting, steps, and handrails where required. Pipe and drape systems for room division, backdrops, and scenic masking. Star cloth and LED curtain backdrops for award ceremonies, gala dinners, and stage presentations.
URL: https://eventsound.ie/services/staging-pipe-drape/

### Event Production
Full technical event production management for conferences, award ceremonies, product launches, gala dinners, corporate events, and live shows across Ireland. EventSound manages all AV elements — sound, lighting, video, staging, and live streaming — as a single coordinated production. Services include pre-production planning, venue technical surveys, equipment specification, show calling, and on-site technical direction. We work alongside event managers, agencies, and in-house teams. Notable clients include Fingal County Council and Louth Local Enterprise Office. Events produced include PRISM conferences, Local Enterprise Week events, School Summit, and corporate award ceremonies.
URL: https://eventsound.ie/services/event-production/

### AV Hire & Audio Visual Equipment
Professional audio visual equipment hire for conferences, meetings, seminars, and corporate events. Complete AV packages including projectors, screens, sound systems, microphones, stage monitors, mixing desks, and technical crew. All equipment is professional-grade and maintained to broadcast standards. Every AV hire includes delivery, setup, testing, operation, and breakdown. Available as individual equipment hire or full-service AV production with dedicated technical crew.
URL: https://eventsound.ie/services/av-production/

### PA & Sound System Hire
Professional PA and sound system hire for events from small meetings to large outdoor concerts and festivals. Systems scaled to venue size and audience — from compact column speakers for conference presentations to line array systems for outdoor festivals and concerts. Includes wireless microphones, mixing desks, stage monitors, and dedicated sound engineers. All sound systems are set up, tuned to the venue, and operated by experienced audio engineers.
URL: https://eventsound.ie/services/audio-equipment/

### Lighting Design & Hire
Event lighting hire and design for conferences, award ceremonies, gala dinners, concerts, festivals, and corporate events. Intelligent moving-head fixtures, LED uplighting, architectural lighting, gobo projection, pin spots, and stage wash lighting. Lighting design tailored to each event — from subtle corporate ambience to full concert-grade show lighting. All lighting includes programming, setup, and operation by experienced lighting technicians.
URL: https://eventsound.ie/services/lighting-effects/

### Lighting Design Services
Bespoke lighting design for venues, events, and productions. Consultation, 3D visualisation, and full lighting plots for conferences, theatre, concerts, and architectural installations.
URL: https://eventsound.ie/services/lighting-design/

### Live Event Production & Streaming
Live streaming, hybrid event production, and virtual event services. Multi-camera live streaming to YouTube, Vimeo, Teams, Zoom, and custom platforms. Picture-in-picture layouts, lower thirds, slide integration, and pre-recorded content playback. Professional encoding and redundant internet connectivity for reliable broadcasts. Suitable for conferences, AGMs, town halls, product launches, and award ceremonies with remote audiences.
URL: https://eventsound.ie/services/live-event-production/

### Video Production
Corporate video production, event filming, and post-production services. Multi-camera event coverage, promotional videos, testimonial filming, and highlight reels. Professional cameras, audio, and lighting for on-location and studio-style shoots. Post-production editing, colour grading, graphics, and delivery in broadcast-ready formats.
URL: https://eventsound.ie/services/video-production/

### Video Equipment Hire
Professional video cameras, monitors, switchers, and recording equipment for hire. Suitable for corporate video production, live event recording, and multi-camera productions.
URL: https://eventsound.ie/services/video-equipment/

### Hybrid & Virtual Events
End-to-end hybrid and virtual event production combining in-person AV with professional live streaming. Designed for conferences, AGMs, and corporate events where a portion of the audience attends remotely. Includes audience interaction tools, Q&A management, and multi-platform streaming.
URL: https://eventsound.ie/services/hybrid-events/

### Conference AV Hire
Specialist conference AV packages for hotels, convention centres, and corporate venues across Ireland. Includes screens, projectors, sound systems, microphones, staging, lighting, and dedicated technical crew. Single-room seminars to multi-room multi-day conferences. Available in Dublin, Cork, Galway, Belfast, Limerick, and nationwide.
URL: https://eventsound.ie/services/conference-av/

## Coverage Areas
EventSound is based in Drogheda, Co. Louth and serves all of Ireland. Primary service areas include Dublin, Drogheda, Cork, Galway, Belfast, Limerick, Waterford, Kilkenny, Athlone, Dundalk, Navan, Swords, and nationwide. Dedicated conference AV services available in Belfast, Athlone, and all major Irish cities.

## Key Facts
- Owner-operated by Graham, Managing Director, with over 20 years of event production experience
- All-inclusive quoting model: equipment, delivery, setup, on-site operation, and breakdown included in every hire — no hidden fees or line-item pricing
- Technical crew includes Ronan and Mark for larger multi-crew events
- Equipment includes Absen P2.6 LED panels, Unilumin LED panels, professional-grade audio (line array and point source systems), intelligent lighting fixtures, and broadcast-quality video equipment
- Notable clients: Fingal County Council, Louth Local Enterprise Office
- Notable events: PRISM conferences, Local Enterprise Week, School Summit, Beta Festival, Swords Castle Summer Concerts

## Reviews
Client testimonials and case studies available at https://eventsound.ie/reviews/ and https://eventsound.ie/case-studies/

## Frequently Asked Questions
Q: What areas does EventSound cover?
A: EventSound is based in Drogheda, Co. Louth and provides AV hire and event production services nationwide across Ireland, including Dublin, Cork, Galway, Belfast, Limerick, and all counties.

Q: Does EventSound provide technical crew with equipment hire?
A: Yes. Every hire includes a dedicated technical operator as standard. For larger events, our crew of experienced technicians manages sound, lighting, video, and staging.

Q: What is included in an EventSound quote?
A: Every quote is all-inclusive — equipment, delivery, installation, on-site operation, and breakdown are included. There are no hidden fees or surprise extras.

Q: What size LED video wall do I need?
A: For conference presentations with audiences of 50-200, we typically recommend 3m x 2m to 4m x 2.5m configurations. For large stages and outdoor events, 6m x 3m and above. We recommend the right size based on your venue, audience, and content.

Q: Does EventSound provide LED screen hire for conferences?
A: Yes. We provide individual LED screens and TV monitors from 43 to 98 inches for conferences, exhibitions, and corporate events, as well as large-format modular LED video walls for main stage and keynote presentations.

Q: Can EventSound live stream my event?
A: Yes. We provide professional multi-camera live streaming to YouTube, Vimeo, Teams, Zoom, and custom platforms with picture-in-picture, lower thirds, and slide integration.
